svg.text: Each dot is one round-to-round move of one rollout: current risk coordinate x against the change to the next round, Δx = x(next round) minus x(this
round), pooled across seeds. A saddle between two basins would make the fit cross zero downward twice — it crosses once in both conditions.
The organism judges its own answers
risk coordinate x this round (0 = always cautious, 1 = always gamble)
risk coordinate x this round (0 = always cautious, 1 = always gamble)
spread of seeds, round by round
sd of the risk coordinate across seeds
